Package org.mitre.synthea.helpers

Class ExpressionProcessor

java.lang.Object
org.mitre.synthea.helpers.ExpressionProcessor
public class ExpressionProcessor extends Object
ExpressionProcessor is a utility class for evaluating CQL expressions

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    ExpressionProcessor(String expression)
    ExpressionProcessor convenience constructor when all parameters are Decimals.
    ExpressionProcessor(String expression, Map<String,String> paramTypeMap)

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    Object
    evaluate(Map<String,Object> params)
    Evaluates the expression with the given parameters.
    Object
    evaluate(Person person, long time)
    Evaluates the expression with parameters derived from the given Person object.
    BigDecimal
    evaluateFromSimResults(org.simulator.math.odes.MultiTable results, double leadTime)
    Evaluates the provided expression given the simulation results.
    BigDecimal
    evaluateNumeric(Map<String,Object> params)
    Evaluates the expression with the given numeric parameters, returning the result as a BigDecimal.
    String
    getExpression()
    Returns the expression associated with this expression processor.
    Set<String>
    getParamNames()
    Returns a list of parameters in the expression associated with this processor.
    Map<String,String>
    getParamTypes()
    Returns a map of parameter names to their CQL types as provided to the constructor.
    static Object

    Retrieve the desired value from a Person model.

    Retrieve the desired value from a Person model.

  • Constructor Details

    • ExpressionProcessor

      public ExpressionProcessor(String expression)
      ExpressionProcessor convenience constructor when all parameters are Decimals.
      Parameters:
      expression - Expression to evaluate for each future set of parameters.

    • ExpressionProcessor

      public ExpressionProcessor(String expression, Map<String,String> paramTypeMap)
      ExpressionProcessor constructor.
      Parameters:
      expression - Expression to evaluate for each future set of parameters.
      paramTypeMap - Map of parameter names to their corresponding CQL types.

  • Method Details

    • getExpression

      public String getExpression()
      Returns the expression associated with this expression processor.
      Returns:
      expression

    • getParamNames

      public Set<String> getParamNames()
      Returns a list of parameters in the expression associated with this processor.
      Returns:
      list of parameters

    • getParamTypes

      public Map<String,String> getParamTypes()
      Returns a map of parameter names to their CQL types as provided to the constructor.
      Returns:
      map of parameter names to CQL type names

    • evaluateNumeric

      public BigDecimal evaluateNumeric(Map<String,Object> params)
      Evaluates the expression with the given numeric parameters, returning the result as a BigDecimal.
      Parameters:
      params - numeric parameters as a map of variable names to values
      Returns:
      evaluation result

    • getPersonValue

      public static Object getPersonValue(String param, Person person, long time)
      Retrieve the desired value from a Person model. Check for a VitalSign first and then an attribute if there is no VitalSign by the provided name. Throws an IllegalArgumentException if neither exists.
      Parameters:
      param - name of the VitalSign or attribute to retrieve from the Person
      person - Person instance to get the parameter from
      time - current time
      Returns:
      value

    • getPersonValue

      public static Object getPersonValue(String param, Person person, long time, String expression)
      Retrieve the desired value from a Person model. Check for a VitalSign first and then an attribute if there is no VitalSign by the provided name. Throws an IllegalArgumentException if neither exists.
      Parameters:
      param - name of the VitalSign or attribute to retrieve from the Person
      person - Person instance to get the parameter from
      time - current time
      expression - the expression being evaluated, for error reporting
      Returns:
      value

    • evaluateFromSimResults

      public BigDecimal evaluateFromSimResults(org.simulator.math.odes.MultiTable results, double leadTime)
      Evaluates the provided expression given the simulation results.
      Parameters:
      results - table of simulation results
      leadTime - lead time in seconds before using table values
      Returns:
      BigDecimal result value

    • evaluate

      public Object evaluate(Person person, long time)
      Evaluates the expression with parameters derived from the given Person object.
      Parameters:
      person - Person instance to get parameters from
      time - simulation time
      Returns:
      evaluation result

    • evaluate

      public Object evaluate(Map<String,Object> params)
      Evaluates the expression with the given parameters.
      Parameters:
      params - parameters as a map of variable names to values
      Returns:
      evaluation result
